# Order Books - C++ Project with CMake

This is a C++ project that uses CMake as the build system.

## Project Setup Notes

- **Language:** C++17
- **Build System:** CMake 3.10+
- **Project Structure:** Standard C++ layout with src/, include/, and build/ directories

## Development Guidelines

- Source files (.cpp) go in `src/`
- Header files (.h, .hpp) go in `include/`
- Build the project from the `build/` directory
- Ensure C++17 support in your compiler
